title: The Last Rites of Ransom Pride
original_title: The Last Rites of Ransom Pride
overview: When Juliette sets out to bring her slain lover – outlaw Ransom Pride – home to Texas to be buried, she knows the journey won't be easy, but she has little idea of the dangers that lie ahead in this dark Western drama.
